expectedOutput.requirementDescription: As a healthcare application user,I want to create a patient, schedule an appointment, and create a clinical note,So that the complete patient care workflow can be validated from registration to documentation. This user story covers validation of the end-to-end healthcare workflow, including patient creation, scheduler appointment creation, and note creation. The purpose is to ensure that patient details, scheduled appointments, and clinical documentation are properly connected and working as expected.
expectedOutput.acceptanceCriteria:
User should be able to create a new patient with valid mandatory details.

Created patient should be searchable from the patient search screen.

User should be able to schedule an appointment for the created patient.

Scheduled appointment should be displayed correctly in the Scheduler.

User should be able to open the scheduled appointment.

User should be able to create a clinical note from the appointment.

Therapy Session Start Time, Stop Time, and Total Time fields should be displayed correctly.

User should be able to save and close the note successfully.

Created note should be visible under the patient documentation/history section.

Any functional, validation, or UI issue should be logged as a defect.

suggestedTestFocus: Verify patient creation with all mandatory valid details
Validate field-level and form-level validations during patient registration
Confirm newly created patient is searchable from patient search screen
Verify appointment scheduling for the created patient
Confirm scheduled appointment displays correctly in the Scheduler
Validate opening the scheduled appointment from the Scheduler
Verify creation of a clinical note from the appointment workflow
Confirm Therapy Session Start Time, Stop Time, and Total Time fields display correctly
Validate save and close behavior for the clinical note
Confirm created note appears under patient documentation/history
Verify linkage and data consistency across patient, appointment, and note records
Test UI behavior and usability across the end-to-end workflow
Check for regression impact on existing patient, scheduling, and documentation flows
